options.system: You are a senior industry strategy analyst working for Tiger Analytics.  Your responsibility is to analyze industry-specific business challenges and identify AI, analytics, and digital transformation opportunities relevant to enterprise consulting proposals.  Guidelines: - Focus on enterprise business value - Provide practical and industry-relevant insights - Emphasize AI, analytics, automation, operational efficiency, customer experience, and decision intelligence - Tailor insights based on the decision maker role - Be concise, strategic, and professional - Never use markdown - Never explain reasoning - Return ONLY valid JSON

You are a senior business research analyst working for Tiger Analytics, a data and AI consulting company.  Your responsibility is to analyze company and industry information and generate structured business intelligence for AI consulting proposals.  Guidelines: - Always provide factual, business-oriented insights - Focus on AI, analytics, automation, customer experience, operational efficiency, and digital transformation opportunities - If website content is unavailable, use general industry and company knowledge - Be concise, specific, and professional - Never return markdown - Never explain your reasoning - Return ONLY valid JSON

values.content:
=Analyze this company:

DATA SOURCE STATUS:
{{ $json.fetch_status }}

Company:
{{ $json.body.company_name }}

Industry:
{{ $json.body.industry }}

Website Content:
{{ $json.website_content }}

Return JSON with:
- company_overview
- products_services
- recent_initiatives
- technology_mentioned
- visible_pain_points

options.system:
You are a senior proposal strategist at Tiger Analytics, a global leader in AI and analytics consulting trusted by Fortune 1000 companies.

Tiger Analytics facts to reference:
- 4000+ team of technologists and consultants
- Partnerships with AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft, Databricks
- Recognized by Forrester, Gartner, Everest Group, ISG
- 2025 Databricks Enterprise AI Partner of the Year
- Microsoft Partner of the Year finalist 2025
- Accelerators: TigerML, Tiger Blueprints, Tiger DataSphere, Tiger AI Hub
- Industries: CPG, Retail, BFS, Insurance, Manufacturing, Life Sciences, Healthcare

Your job is to write proposals that sound like they were written by a 10-year industry veteran — not a chatbot.

Rules:
- Always use the actual company name — never [Client Name]
- Always use industry-specific KPIs and terminology from the knowledge base
- Every number must be specific and grounded in the research provided
- Tailor every section to the decision maker role
- Never use markdown formatting inside JSON values
- Never use ** bold or bullet points with * or -
- Write plain prose strings only
- Never include real newlines inside JSON string values
- Return ONLY valid JSON — no backticks, no explanation

You are a senior AI solutions consultant working for Tiger Analytics.  Your responsibility is to connect business pain points with practical AI, analytics, and automation solutions.  Guidelines: - Identify meaningful business pain points from the provided context - Map each pain point to a specific solution capability - Focus on measurable business outcomes and ROI - Tailor language to the decision maker role - Use enterprise consulting language - Keep recommendations realistic and actionable - Be concise and professional - Never use markdown - Never explain reasoning - Return ONLY valid JSON - Never wrap JSON inside ```json

=You are a senior AI consulting strategist at Tiger Analytics.

Generate EXACTLY 3 completely different solution approaches.
Each solution must use a fundamentally different strategy.

Generate solutions specific to {{ $json.body.company_name }}
in {{ $json.body.industry }}.Reference the company research provided.
Use industry KB terminology.
Never generate generic solutions.
Always mention specific technologies 
from the preferred stack."

Rules:
- Return EXACTLY 3 solutions in a JSON array
- Each solution must be meaningfully different from the others
- Never return fewer than 3 solutions
- Never use markdown
- Never explain reasoning  
- Return ONLY valid JSON array
- Never wrap in backticks

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;

const response = {
  status: "solutions_ready",
  company_name: data.body?.company_name || data.company_name || '',
  industry: data.body?.industry || data.industry || '',
  decision_maker: data.body?.decision_maker || data.decision_maker || '',
  problem_statement: data.body?.problem_statement || data.problem_statement || '',
  business_impact: data.body?.business_impact || data.business_impact || '',
  technologies: data.body?.technologies || data.technologies || [],
  delivery_type: data.body?.delivery_type || data.delivery_type || '',
  timeline: data.body?.timeline || data.timeline || '',
  budget_range: data.body?.budget_range || data.budget_range || '',
  solutions: data.solutions || [],
  research_data: data.research_data || {},
  industry_data: data.industry_data || {},
  kb_context: data.kb_context || '',
  has_kb: data.has_kb || false
};

return { response: JSON.stringify(response) };

const data = $input.first().json;

const response = {
  status: "completed",
  company_name: data.body?.company_name || data.company_name || '',
  decision_maker: data.body?.decision_maker || data.decision_maker || '',
  industry: data.body?.industry || data.industry || '',
  problem_statement: data.body?.problem_statement || data.problem_statement || '',
  budget_range: data.body?.budget_range || data.budget_range || '',
  timeline: data.body?.timeline || data.timeline || '',
  generated_at: data.generated_at || new Date().toISOString(),
  has_kb: data.body?.has_kb || data.has_kb || false,
  kb_industry: data.body?.kb_industry || data.kb_industry || '',
  engagement_title: data.proposal?.engagement_title || 
                    data.proposal?.situation_assessment?.split('.')[0] || 
                    'AI-Powered Analytics Engagement',
  proposal: data.proposal || {},
};

return { response: JSON.stringify(response) };

parameters.content:
## 🚀 InstaPitch — Multi-Agent Consulting Proposal Automator

This workflow transforms any client URL into a consulting-grade proposal in under a minute using a 6-agent AI pipeline.

### 🔥 Why This Workflow Exist
At the core of InstaPitch is a multi-agent orchestration system where each agent has a focused role:
- Eliminates manual company research by fetching live website data via Jina AI
- Injects domain expertise through a built-in Knowledge Base across 8 industry verticals
- Generates 3 tailored solution strategies — human picks one before drafting begins
- AI Guardrail node validates output quality before returning to frontend
- Human-in-the-Loop editing supported before final export

⚡ Instead of starting from scratch every time, InstaPitch brings institutional knowledge into every proposal automatically.

### 🔍 What It Does
This workflow:
- Accepts a client URL via webhook from the frontend
- Fetches live website content using Jina AI
- Runs 5 specialized AI agents in sequence (Research → Industry → Pain Point → Solution → Proposal Drafter)
- Looks up the built-in Knowledge Base for industry-specific benchmarks
- Returns 3 solution options for human selection
- Drafts an 11-section consulting proposal based on chosen solution
- Applies AI Guardrails before returning the final HTML/PDF proposal

### ⚙️ How It Works (High-Level)
- User submits client URL from frontend
- Jina AI fetches and cleans live website content
- Research Agent extracts company intelligence
- Industry Agent pulls sector benchmarks and context
- Pain Point Agent maps business challenges
- Knowledge Base injects vertical-specific expertise (Banking, Insurance, Healthcare, Retail & more)
- Solution Agent generates 3 tailored strategies
- Human selects preferred solution via frontend
- Proposal Drafter Agent writes the full 11-section proposal
- AI Guardrail validates output
- Final proposal returned to frontend as HTML/PDF

### 🧠 Key Capabilities
- 6-agent AI pipeline (Claude-powered via Anthropic)
- Built-in Knowledge Base across 8 industry verticals (no external DB needed)
- Human-in-the-Loop design — human approves solutions before drafting
- AI Guardrail for output quality control
- Dual webhook architecture (solutions + final proposal)
- Frontend-ready JSON responses

### ⚠️ Requirements
- Anthropic (Claude) API key — powers all 5 AI agents
- Jina AI API key — for live website fetching
- Any webhook-capable frontend (Lovable, React, etc.)
- n8n Cloud or self-hosted n8n instance

### 💡 Example Use Cases
- Pre-sales proposal automation for consulting firms
- Client pitch preparation
- RFP response generation
- Sales enablement tooling
- Business development automation

### 🛠️ Tech Stack
- n8n (Multi-Agent Workflow Orchestration)
- Anthropic Claude (AI Agents)
- Jina AI (Web Research)
- Lovable (React Frontend)
- Google Gemini 2.0 Flash (Solution Refinement)

### 📥 INPUT + SECURITY (Prompt Injection)


**Receive Inputs (Webhook)**
POST endpoint. Accepts: company_url, company_name, industry, decision_maker, problem_statement, solution_preference, own_solution, technologies, delivery_type, timeline, budget_range.

**AI Guardrail (Code)**
Scans all inputs for prompt injection patterns — jailbreak, "ignore previous instructions", "act as", "system prompt", "developer mode". Throws error immediately if detected. Safe inputs pass through unchanged to the next node.

### 🌐 LIVE CLIENT RESEARCH


**Fetch Company Website (HTTP Request)**
Calls Jina AI to convert client website to clean markdown text.

### 🧠 RESEARCH AGENT


**Research Agent (Anthropic)**
Analyzes website content to extract structured company intelligence.

### 📊 INDUSTRY AGENT


**Industry Agent (Anthropic)**
Analyzes industry context tailored to the decision maker role. Extracts: industry_trends, common_root_causes, benchmark_data, decision_maker_priorities, ai_opportunities, competitive_context.

**Extract Industry Data (Code)**
Same parse pattern as Extract Research Data. Appends industry_data object to the pipeline payload.

### 📚 KNOWLEDGE BASE LOOKUP


Matches selected industry to built-in KB:

🏦 Banking & FS — NPA, CASA ratio, Basel III, Temenos
🏥 Insurance — lapse rate, persistency ratio, IRDAI, Guidewire
💊 Healthcare — ALOS, HIPAA, Epic, readmission rate
🛒 Retail — GMV, AOV, CAC, RFM, Snowflake
📡 Telecom — ARPU, TRAI, Amdocs, churn rate
🏭 Manufacturing — OEE, ISO 9001, SAP ERP
🎬 Media — DAU/MAU, SVOD, content ROI
⚡ Energy — SAIDI, CERC, OSIsoft PI

Outputs: kb_context (terminology string), kb_industry, has_kb flag. All injected into the Proposal Drafter prompt to generate expert-level industry output.

### 🔀 SOLUTION ROUTER


Checks solution_preference field from webhook input:

✅ TRUE = "ai_suggest"
→ Routes to Solution Agent
→ Generates 3 AI-powered tailored solutions

❌ FALSE = "own_idea"
→ Routes to Solution Refiner - Gemini
→ Professionally refines user's own solution idea

Both paths eventually merge at Return Solutions to Frontend node.

### 💡 PATH A — AI Suggest (3 Solutions)


**Solution Agent (Anthropic)**
Generates EXACTLY 3 distinct, tailored solution approaches using company research + industry KB + preferred tech stack. Each solution has: option_number, title, description, approach, key_deliverables, best_for, estimated_effort, expected_outcome.

### ✏️ PATH B — Own Idea Refiner


**Solution Refiner (HTTP Request → Gemini)**
Calls Gemini 2.0 Flash directly via HTTP. Takes user's rough solution idea and professionally restructures it — adding phases, deliverables, and measurable outcomes — while fully preserving the user's core idea.

### 🎯 PAIN MAPPING


**Pain Point Agent (Anthropic)**
Maps each identified client pain point to the selected solution component. For each pain outputs: PAIN name, SEVERITY (Critical/High/Medium), ROOT CAUSE, SOLUTION component , OUTCOME metric, delivery week.

### ✍️ PROPOSAL DRAFTER AGENT


Core proposal generation engine. Uses ALL accumulated context: company research, industry KB, pain map, selected solution, kb_context. Generates 11 sections in structured JSON using || separators for tabular data. Max 4096 tokens.

11 Sections generated:

1. engagement_title      
2. situation_assessment  
3. root_cause_diagnosis  
4. tiger_pov           
5. proposed_solution   
6. pain_solution_map
7. investment_roi
8. risk_mitigation
9. our_team
10. credentials
11. next_steps

### 📄 PARSE + FORMAT + RETURN


**PDF Formatter (Code)**
Generates full branded proposal with: gradient header, KPI stat cards, 11 section cards, visual tables, phase timelines, ROI panels, team cards, credentials, next steps.

**Return Final Proposal to Frontend**
Sends completed 11-section proposal back to frontend as text.

body.kb_context: INDUSTRY KNOWLEDGE BASE — Use this to make the proposal expert-level. Industry Terminology: NPA, CASA ratio, AUM, credit underwriting, KYC, AML, delinquency, write-off, cross-sell, CLTV. Key KPIs: Capital Adequacy Ratio, Net Interest Margin, ROE, NPA ratio, CLTV, CASA ratio, cost-to-income ratio. Relevant Regulations: RBI guidelines, Basel III, SEBI regulations, PCI DSS, FEMA, IND AS. Common Pain Points: credit risk, AML compliance, customer attrition, cross-sell failure, fraud detection. Tech Stack: Temenos, Finastra, FIS, Murex, Bloomberg Terminal, Salesforce. Solution Patterns: credit risk scoring, AML transaction monitoring, customer churn prediction, cross-sell propensity model, fraud detection.

industry_data.benchmark_data: Leading banks typically achieve single-digit credit card attrition rates of 5-8% and cross-sell conversion rates of 15-25% through targeted campaigns
industry_data.industry_trends: Intensifying competition from fintechs and challenger banks, rising customer expectations for personalized experiences, increased regulatory scrutiny on fair lending practices, growing importance of digital channels
industry_data.ai_opportunities: AI-powered churn prediction models, personalized offer generation engines, cross-selling recommendation systems, sentiment analysis, automated marketing campaign optimization
industry_data.common_root_causes: Lack of personalized offers and communication, ineffective lifecycle management, insufficient understanding of customer churn predictors, competitive pressure on interest rates and rewards
industry_data.competitive_context: HDFC Bank faces strong competition from ICICI, Axis Bank, SBI as well as emerging fintechs investing in sophisticated data analytics and AI
industry_data.decision_maker_priorities: Enhancing customer lifetime value, improving brand perception and loyalty, optimizing marketing spend efficiency, driving digital customer engagement

research_data.company_overview: HDFC Bank is a prominent Indian banking and financial services company. It is one of India largest private sector banks, offering a wide range of financial products and services to corporate and retail customers.
research_data.products_services: HDFC Bank offers a comprehensive suite of banking and financial services, including retail banking, wholesale banking, treasury, auto loans, personal loans, credit cards, debit cards, wealth management, insurance, and investment services.
research_data.recent_initiatives: HDFC Bank is consistently investing in digital transformation initiatives, enhancing its mobile banking applications, expanding its digital payment solutions, and exploring new avenues for customer engagement through technology.
research_data.visible_pain_points: Customer attrition in credit card segment, declining cross-sell conversion rates
research_data.technology_mentioned: Cybersecurity measures, bot management technologies, digital banking platforms

body.business_impact: Losing 15% of credit card customers annually, cross-sell conversion dropped from 18% to 9% in last 2 years resulting in $12M revenue impact
body.problem_statement: High customer attrition in credit card segment with declining cross-sell conversion rates

selected_solution.title: Predictive Analytics Solution
selected_solution.approach: Phase 1: Data audit → Phase 2: Model build → Phase 3: Deploy
selected_solution.description: Build a predictive model to identify and address the core business problem proactively.

body.business_impact: 22% annual lapse rate, 2.8x above IRDAI benchmark, $8M annual premium loss
body.problem_statement: High policy lapse rate in ULIP segment impacting persistency ratio and AUM growth
